basic_details.job_title: Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer (Editing) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website https://tmc.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer (Editing) Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate or Ph.D in any stream
qualification.details: Post Graduate or Ph.D in any stream with minimum one year experience in Medical/Biology Environment/Writing or rapporteur experience, especially in a journal in Medical Sciences or experience as a Medical writer or a reviewer of a Medical journal. Proficiency in English language and Computer Skills.

content_sections.heading: Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.tata_memorial_hospital: Post Graduate or Ph.D in any stream

content_sections.heading: Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Tata Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer (Editing) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate or Ph.D in any stream with minimum one year experience in Medical/Biology Environment/Writing or rapporteur experience, especially in a journal in Medical Sciences or experience as a Medical writer or a reviewer of a Medical journal. Proficiency in English language and Computer Skills.

rows.event: Last date for online interview request

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Tata Memorial Hospital Assistant Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Assistant Administrative Officer (Editing).

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Assistant Administrative Officer (Editing) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is Post Graduate or Ph.D in any stream with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 60,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400012.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificate (if applicable).
